india_trends.title: Multibagger defence stock Apollo Micro Systems share price jumps over 9% after Q4 results
india_trends.summary: Apollo Micro Systems share price has gained 18% in one month and has rallied 44% in three months. The defence stock has risen 21% on a YTD basis, while it has jumped 138% in one year. Apollo Micro Systems share price has delivered multibagger returns of 195% in two years and 911% in three years.

india_trends.summary: Gold prices rose while silver declined on MCX Tuesday as a weaker dollar and cooling crude oil prices influenced sentiment. Gold gained after U.S. President Donald Trump delayed a planned strike on Iran, easing concerns over oil supply disruptions and inflation.

india_trends.title: BPCL, HPCL, Adani Total, other oil and gas stocks gain after crude oil prices ease
india_trends.summary: Oil and gas shares increased on May 19 due to reduced US-Iran tensions, boosting optimism for crude supply stability. Major Indian oil firms saw shares rise nearly 4% as falling crude prices are expected to enhance profitability.
